---
page-layout: full
toc: false
---

::: {.column-body}

## Hi, I'm Erwin

Language got me into academia. I have a PhD in linguistics from UW–Madison — my dissertation was about idiomatic phrases, which is a technical way of saying I spent years trying to understand why kick the bucket makes perfect sense to everyone even though it shouldn't. That question hasn't entirely left me.


These days I work as a Research Data Science Consultant at UW–Madison and help run BRUG, a community of R users in the research computing space. The work is about three things I can't seem to separate: getting data science tools into more researchers' hands, helping them produce work that holds up to scrutiny, and clearing away the small frictions that eat time without adding anything. I'm a humanist, and I think those are ethical goals as much as technical ones.



:::

```{=html}
<div class="cards-grid-outer">
  <div class="cards-grid">

    <div class="card card-day-job">
      <div class="card-inner">
        <div class="card-logo-panel">
          <img src="images/dayjob-logo.png" class="card-logo-img" alt="Research Data Science">
        </div>
        <div class="card-vdivider"></div>
        <div class="card-text">
          <h3 class="card-title-text">Day Job</h3>
          <p class="card-desc-text">Research Data Science Consultant at UW-Madison. I work with researchers on the tools and strategies that make their work more reproducible, shareable, and visible.</p>
          <a href="day-job/" class="card-link-text">Learn more →</a>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="card card-pottery">
      <div class="card-inner">
        <div class="card-logo-panel">
          <img src="images/pottery-logo.png" class="card-logo-img" alt="las rubieras pottery">
        </div>
        <div class="card-vdivider"></div>
        <div class="card-text">
          <h3 class="card-title-text">las rubieras pottery</h3>
          <p class="card-desc-text">las rubieras pottery is functional stoneware made to be held. The name comes from a lush corner of a Venezuelan farm — green against the dry season sun, almost like a mirage.</p>
          <a href="https://lasrubieraspottery.com" class="card-link-text">Visit the studio →</a>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="card card-aikido">
      <div class="card-inner">
        <div class="card-logo-panel">
          <img src="images/aikido-logo.png" class="card-logo-img" alt="Capital Aikikai Wisconsin">
        </div>
        <div class="card-vdivider"></div>
        <div class="card-text">
          <h3 class="card-title-text">Capital Aikikai of Wisconsin</h3>
          <p class="card-desc-text">CAoW is a dojo dedicated to the practice and promotion of the Japanese Martial Art of Aikido.</p>
          <a href="https://aikidoofwisconsin.com" class="card-link-text">Visit the dojo →</a>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="card card-brug">
      <div class="card-inner">
        <div class="card-logo-panel">
          <img src="images/brug-logo.png" class="card-logo-img" alt="BRUG logo">
        </div>
        <div class="card-vdivider"></div>
        <div class="card-text">
          <h3 class="card-title-text">BRUG</h3>
          <p class="card-desc-text">The Badger R User Group — a community of practice for researchers who code in R at UW-Madison.</p>
          <a href="https://erwinlares.github.io/the-burrows/" class="card-link-text">Visit BRUG →</a>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

  </div>
</div>
```
